items.content:
About This Role

We are searching for an experienced VP of Engineering to lead our growing engineering organization. Reporting directly to the CTO, you will be responsible for the technical strategy, team structure, and execution across all engineering teams. This is a critical leadership role that will shape the future of our platform and company.

You will oversee approximately 60 engineers across backend, frontend, infrastructure, and QA. We need a leader who can balance technical excellence with organizational health and business outcomes.

Responsibilities

  • Set the technical vision and roadmap in partnership with the CTO and product leadership
  • Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class engineering team
  • Establish engineering processes that enable rapid, reliable delivery at scale
  • Own engineering KPIs including velocity, quality, reliability, and team satisfaction
  • Manage engineering budgets, vendor relationships, and infrastructure costs
  • Foster a culture of innovation, inclusion, and continuous improvement

Requirements

  • 12+ years of software engineering experience, with 5+ years in engineering leadership
  • Track record of scaling engineering teams from 30 to 100+ people
  • Deep technical background with the ability to engage in architectural decisions
  • Experience managing managers and building organizational structure
  • Strong executive communication skills and business acumen

Nice to Have

  • Experience leading engineering at a company through an IPO or major funding round
  • Background in content management, CMS, or digital experience platforms
  • Experience with remote-first or distributed engineering teams
